Video.summary: Demetrius cheated on Aleesha with her sister Keshia and also a stripper named Natalie. Then, Kahari's here to reveal to his girlfriend Jasmine that not only is he bi-sexual, but he's also been cheating on he with a transsexual named.
Video.title: Transtastic Confessions

Video.summary: Chris claims that Brianna's very controlling and doesn't let him go out to do the things that make him happy. Then, Chad is here to propose to his girlfriend Star but before they book the caterer, Star has a little confession to make.
Video.title: Best Friend Beatdown

Video.summary: Last time, Nancy was pregnant with Versell's baby. He was cheating on her with Tara and now she’s pregnant!
Video.title: Update: Woman In Labor Confronts Mistress

Image.alt: Update: Woman In Labor Confronts Mistress
Update: Woman In Labor Confronts Mistress
Update: Woman In Labor Confronts Mistress

Video.summary: They say the "terrible teens" can be a trying time for parents. But 13 year old Kendra is really giving her parents a run for their money. Her father says that she's been caught smoking weed, having sex and even cutting herself.
Video.title: Drugs and Sex At 13?

Video.summary: Heather received a message from Alisha saying that she was pregnant with Remondo's baby but Remondo is Heathers boyfriend! Plus, Silvina and Clee'chaun have been in a relationship for almost 10 years and they've never met in person!
Video.title: She's Not Pregnant, We Never Had Sex

Image.alt: She's Not Pregnant, We Never Had Sex
She's Not Pregnant, We Never Had Sex
She's Not Pregnant, We Never Had Sex

Video.summary: Lagraciala tragically lost her 10 month old son in an accident. She is now accusing AJ of stealing his ashes!
Video.title: Steve Outraged!

Video.summary: Adrian thinks Shantay has been lying throughout their relationship; Uniqua and her husband fear that he is not the father of her child; Chris' girlfriend wants him to know that one of their five children is not his.
Video.title: I'll Prove It's Your Child Once and for All

Image.alt: I'll Prove It's Your Child Once and for All
I'll Prove It's Your Child Once and for All
I'll Prove It's Your Child Once and for All

Video.summary: A man cheats on his girlfriend, then tries to apologize; a woman realizes the father of her child could be her good friend's boyfriend; a woman gets more than she bargained for when she hooks up with her friend's roommate.
Video.title: Pregnant Secrets Dropped

Video.summary: Kristin and her special skill set stand in the way of Rikki's trip down the aisle; Eric did something he regrets and asks his wife to forgive him; Danielle fears that her boyfriend cheated with her cousin Qwon.
Video.title: Now That's a Mouthful

Video.summary: Two friends have both been lying to their boyfriends about their gender. They're actually men!
Video.title: I Have A Secret For My Man!

Image.alt: I Have A Secret For My Man!
I Have A Secret For My Man!
I Have A Secret For My Man!

Video.summary: Shell wants to come clean about her 3 separate affairs. Denise reveals that she’s cheating on her lover!
Video.title: Sizzling Lesbian Sex Scandals

Video.summary: Greg is here to tell Kim that he wants to start dating Mandy. Shannon confronts her man for having an affair.
Video.title: I'm Karate Kicking You Out!

Video.summary: Jessica says she’s been fighting for her man for two years.
Video.title: Surrender My Lover...Or Else!

Video.summary: Niki is here to beg her sister, Margerie, to leave her cheating husband, Chris.
Video.title: Dump Your Cheating Lover!

Video.summary: Roger has been sleeping with his girlfriend's mother and her aunt too.
Video.title: When Lovers Erupt!

Video.summary: Johnny wants his girlfriend Aimee to accept his dominatrix fetish. Then, Maya comes on the show to confront her boyfriend Eric about his abusive sexual fetishes.
Video.title: I Wanted to Be Dominated

Video.summary: Felicia is here to confront her boyfriend and her mother who have been sleeping together for months! Next Susan must come clean to her boyfriend and tell him she's prostituting again!
Video.title: Brawlin' Broads!

Video.summary: Jon is here to tell his girlfriend that he's been cheating on her with her brother! Next Kelly will dump her boyfriend for her secret lover, Bart. Then Malikah will tell her fiancé that she's had a secret lover for the past 3 years!
Video.title: Angry Lovers Attack!

Video.summary: Jennison is here to break up Scooter's marriage. Next Jana thinks her boyfriend is cheating, so she invited our cameras to join her when she confronted him at his home. A search of his house revealed another woman in the closet Jana's twin sister!
Video.title: Cheating Lovers Confess!

Video.summary: Sarah's here for Jonathan. The only problem is Lana, her best friend, who just happens to be Jonathan's girlfriend. Next Kung-fu family feud! David's here to let his brother, Lil Wayne, know that he has been sleeping with his girlfriend Ashley.
Video.title: Kung Fu Hillbilly!

Video.summary: Convict love stories! It's Jerry's jailbird special and he's got two sexy prisoners of love and one mini feisty officer to help keep the inmates in order.
Video.title: Back Off My Jailbird Lover!

Video.summary: Noah and Kendra had a yearlong fling, but when he finally visited her, she had a baby and claimed he was the father! Marvin and Rainy have been married for almost 6 years, but two weeks ago, she received a call saying that Marvin had cheated on her!
Video.title: You're Not the Father, I Borrowed a Baby

Image.alt: You're Not the Father, I Borrowed a Baby
You're Not the Father, I Borrowed a Baby
You're Not the Father, I Borrowed a Baby

Video.summary: Joyia is desperate to keep her friend Stephanie from going back to her abusive boyfriend Scott. If Stephanie takes him back, Scott will continue to abuse her. But she still loves him! Will she have the strength to leave him?
Video.title: How Can You Still Love Him?

Image.alt: How Can You Still Love Him?
How Can You Still Love Him?
How Can You Still Love Him?

Video.summary: Katrina says she was molested by her step-father as a child. Katrina says that when she told her mother Phyllis, she not only forgave him, but stayed with himI And there's more... Katrina says after telling Phyllis, he continued to molest her!
Video.title: A Family Ripped Apart

Video.summary: Michael and Flora are no longer dating, but they have a 3 year old daughter together. Michael thinks that Flora’s boyfriend Dwayne is abusing his daughter, but is he telling the truth? Watch Steve get to the bottom of this!
Video.title: 3 Year Old Locked in the Basement

Image.alt: 3 Year Old Locked in the Basement
3 Year Old Locked in the Basement
3 Year Old Locked in the Basement

Video.summary: Did Marcus’s ex’s boyfriend Charles molest their son? Ex Jamaica is torn between kicking out Charles for the meanwhile and wondering if Marcus’s girlfriend Tonya is lying to gain custody of the boy. What will Charles’s lie detector test say?
Video.title: A Mother's Wrath

Video.summary: Wade constantly accuses Angela of cheating on him and admits to beating and berating her. Angela is desperate for the abuse to end. Then, Stacy wants to prove to her boyfriend that she hasn’t been cheating on him with a lie detector test!
Video.title: I Beat Her Because She's Fat

Image.alt: I Beat Her Because She's Fat
I Beat Her Because She's Fat
I Beat Her Because She's Fat

Video.summary: Nathan currently has 4 children with 2 different women and is in a serious mountain of trouble. Jamie, his first baby's mother, is tired of his lasting neglect for their 3 kids and needs him to step up to the role.
Video.title: You Call Yourself A Father?

Video.summary: Ashley's mother is here because she says she's witnessed first hand Ashley's boyfriend Scott's abusive ways. She says that Scott has completely isolated Ashley and her grandchild from the rest of her family.
Video.title: You Want Him To Be The Father?

Image.alt: You Want Him To Be The Father?
You Want Him To Be The Father?
You Want Him To Be The Father?

Video.summary: 14 year old Rusty called our show because he says that he can no longer deal with his parent's constant fighting. He says that in the past they've hit each other, thrown appliances at each other and even bit him. His mother Mildred says that she and her husband Russell always fight and abuse each other because she suspects Russell of cheating.
Video.title: Steve I'm 14, I Need Your Help

Image.alt: Steve I'm 14, I Need Your Help
Steve I'm 14, I Need Your Help
Steve I'm 14, I Need Your Help

Video.summary: Callista has been living with a horrible rumor about her father, who has no idea what he's been accused of.
Video.title: A Lifetime of Lies?

Video.summary: Anastasia and Robert's 2 year relationship crumbled when he heard rumors that she was cheating on him.
Video.title: I Left You But You Are The Father

Image.alt: I Left You But You Are The Father
I Left You But You Are The Father
I Left You But You Are The Father

Video.summary: A married mother of six says she is done with her husband and is in love with a 17-year-old boy.
Video.title: My Wife Is Engaged To A Teenager

Image.alt: My Wife Is Engaged To A Teenager
My Wife Is Engaged To A Teenager
My Wife Is Engaged To A Teenager
